titleStmt.title: SII 7.331: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 331. (A.R. No. 140 of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING IN SRIDHARASASTRI'S HOUSE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatēṁ nama[ḥ .*] śrīgurubhyōṁ nama[ḥ .*] ni¨rvvignamastu . namastuṁgaśiraccuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trai
lōkyanagarāraṁbemulastaṁbhaya śaṁbavē . svasti śrī . jayādbudaya śālivāhana śakavaruśa 1508 saṁdu
va¨rtamāna sa¨rvvajitū saṁvaścarada cayitra śudha 3 guru 30 ge mahānakṣatraU 29 nityanakṣatra citra 46 . Ayiṁdra
yōga 9 . garajaṁkaraṇa yēvaṁ paṁcāṁga śrīmaṁnmāhārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivarā
yaru vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalū suśisaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ dōlagaṁgoṭṭiha samayadalū A rāyara nirūpadiṁ
kaṁcapavoḍeyaru bārakūrarājyavanu pratipālisuva kāladalū mūṟukēriya sōmanāthadēvara saṁnidhiyalū nāguvaṁṇa
seṭṭiyara maga putrabaḷiya saṁṇaṇaseṭṭiyaru dānadhārāpū¨rvvakavāgi kaṭṭisida chatramaṭhada catussīmeya vivara mūḍalū kāḷiṁgeṇi
nara maṭhada gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalū teṁkalu rājabīdiyiṁ baḍaga paḍuvalu rājabīdiyiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu sōmanāthadēvara rājāṁgaṇadiṁ Agrada
lu maṭada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī catusīmeya voḷaguḷa maṭadalū Uṁba brāhmaṇa bhōjana pratidinadalū naḍava jana 6 gū dēva
pūjegu biṭṭa Akki sthaḷa vivara nāU bada brahmadāyada mūlada bāḷu tōṭakaṭṭina paḍuvada teṁkaṇada maneya bayaloḷage A bāḷa
catusīme vivara hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu kuṁnyaṇahēraḷa śaṁkara hēraḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalū kannana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu nāraṇahēra
ḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī nālku gaḍiyiṁdaṁvoḷage bitu mū 1 Ø muvattu hāne mūḍalu hōda hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu kē
śavatuṁgara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu ka¨rttara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu viṣṇuhōḷara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī nālu gaḍiyiṁdaṁvo
ḷage bi mu 1Ø mūvattu hāne gade mtaṁ nāraṇahōḷara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu ka¨rttara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu viṣṇuhēraḷa gaḍiyiṁda
ṁ mūḍalu nāraṇahōḷana kēśavakāraṁtana yi ka¨rttara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī nālku gaḍiyiṁdaṁ voḷage bi mu Ø5 yipattayi
du hāne gade mtaṁ ka¨rtara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu ka¨rtara gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu ka¨rtara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu tuṁgaṇara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁ
kalu yī nālku gaḍiyiṁdaṁvoḷage bi mu Ø yippattu hāne gade mtaṁ kruṣṇahēraḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu keṁgaravara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu
kunnahēraḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu viṣṇahēraḷa gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yī nālu gaḍiyiṁdaṁ voḷage bi mu 1Ø māvattu hāne gade Aṁ
tu Ayidu ṭhāvina baḷu saha bittu mu 31Ø5 mūṟumuḍiyu mūvattayidu hāne gade [ṁdeka¨rtta] kaḷaci maṭakke naḍasuva gēṇi kā
laṁprati nāghaṁḍugadalū Akki mu 11 hanoṁdu muḍi Akki mataṁ hadaṭenoḷage yi[Emā]rabayaloḷage muḍalū
brahasada vōṇi gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu naḍeva vōṇiyiṁdaṁ baḍa yoḷagaṇa cōḷikēriya maṭada gaḍi
maṇigārara kēri basti yī nālku gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu maṇigārakēri halara gaḍi kruṣṇabāsuri gaḍi yi
ka¨rtara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu rama Āyita Unukannema bāsuriya bāsuriya muḍa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
teṁkalu yiṁttī nālku gaḍiyiṁdhaṁ voḷage nāghaṁḍugadalu [Akki]mu 5 Āyidu muḍi gade mataṁ bāvaṁna
bāsuri gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva . bāvaṁna bāsuri kruṣṇa bāsuri yiṁdaṁ baḍa naḍava vōṇiI
ṁdaṁ mūḍa naḍava vōṇi kruṣṇabāsuriya Eraḍu gaḍiyiṁdaṁ bittu mu
ḍi 5 . 5 Āyidu muḍiyu muvattayidu hāne gade yi bāḷiṁge nāgaṁ nāgaṁḍugadalu Ākki
mu 23 yippatamuru muḍi Ākki pagaṁpaḷi paḍuvakare
tadiṁdaṁ muḍa kuṁnyamaṇi hēraḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁka
naḍava gēṇi Ākki muḍi 16 Ākṣaradalu hadinaru muḍi nāgaṁ samudragaḍi na gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
paḍuvalū . dēvasvadiṁdaṁ baḍagalu . jejaṇana gaḍiyi ḍa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalū . tiṁmappahōḷara . saṁkarahōḷageyikaḷa yiṁdoḷage mu 2 hā
5 gade mataṁ jajaṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva . jajaṇa hō yiṁdaṁ baḍagalu jejaṇa
na gaḍiyiṁdaṁ muḍalu jajaṇagaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁka . yeraḍu muḍiyu
haneraḍu hana teru dēvasva kaḷaci naḍava Ākki mu Ālase kaṭṭina gumana gaḍi
bāḷagaḍi vivara maṇigarakēriyalu . brahmasada vōṇi gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva naraṇa Alaseya gaḍiṁ
daṁ baḍaga . maṇigārakēri halara gaḍiyiṁ muḍa . maṇigarakēri halara gaḍiyiṁ teṁka . nalugaḍiyiṁdoḷage . 35 A
kṣaradalu mūvattayidu muḍi
Digital edition of SII 7.331 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
